KRAVEiN: Snap, find & order best food

attributes.name: description
attributes.content: Australia's favourite platform to discover dishes, drinks, cafes, restaurants or nightlife. We’re on a mission to photograph and review every dish in every restaurant, cafe and bar in Australia, so you can order with confidence.
KRAVEiN: Snap, find & order best food

Australia's favourite platform to discover dishes, drinks, cafes, restaurants or nightlife. We’re on a mission to photograph and review every dish in every restaurant, cafe and bar in Australia, so you can order with confidence.

Find the best food, dish or drink,

Found a wonderful dish or drink?
Together, we are photographing and reviewing every popular dish in every restaurant, cafe or bar in Australia. Why? So, you can find the best lobster, laksa or lasagne near you.
Add photos and reviews of your favourite dishes.
Scroll and search other foodies’ photos.
Many websites review restaurants. Only on KRAVEiN can you find the best pasta or steak near you.
Share what you love and find your next meal today.
KRAVEiN is the only social media platform 100% dedicated to food.
